title: TechCorp Compliance Summary — Vendor Assessment
body:
**COMPLIANCE POSTURE OVERVIEW**

TechCorp is committed to maintaining the highest standards of data security and operational compliance. This summary provides TechCorp's public-facing compliance position for vendor assessment and due diligence purposes.

**CERTIFICATIONS AND ATTESTATIONS**

TechCorp maintains SOC 2 Type II attestation, demonstrating that our systems and controls meet the American Institute of Certified Public Accountants (AICPA) Trust Services Criteria. Our SOC 2 Type II examination covers the operational effectiveness of our controls across the following trust service principles: Security, Availability, Processing Integrity, Confidentiality, and Privacy. The examination confirms that our systems are designed appropriately and operate effectively to protect customer data and ensure service reliability.

Our most recent SOC 2 Type II attestation report was completed by an independent AICPA-accredited CPA firm and provides objective assessment of our security posture, control design, and operational effectiveness over the audit period. Annual recertification is maintained to ensure continued compliance with evolving security standards.

**AUDIT SCHEDULE AND COMPLIANCE CADENCE**

TechCorp undergoes annual SOC 2 Type II audits conducted by independent external auditors. These audits provide comprehensive evaluation of our security controls, data handling practices, and operational procedures. In addition to the formal annual audit cycle, TechCorp conducts quarterly internal compliance reviews to monitor control effectiveness and identify any areas requiring remediation.

Our compliance framework includes regular access control audits, incident response drills, and data handling assessments performed throughout the calendar year. This continuous approach ensures that compliance is maintained between formal audit periods and that any emerging risks are identified and addressed promptly.
